text: 16. CHANGES IN THE WORK: Should  Contractor,  at  any  time  during  the  progress  of  the  work,  request  any  changes  in  or additions  or  reductions  to  the  scope  of  the  sublet  work  in  this  subcontract,  he  shall  have  the  right  and  power  to  make  such changes, additions or reductions, and Subcontractor shall promptly proceed with such changes, additions or reductions as directed in  writing  by  Contractor,  and  any  appropriate  adjustment  of  Subcontract  Amount  may  be  made  by  written  Change  Order.  If Subcontractor  believes  that  any  such  change  or  addition  entitles  Subcontractor  to  an  increase  of  the  Subcontract  Amount, Subcontractor  shall,  within  a  reasonable  time  not  to  exceed  three  (3)  working  days  thereafter,  submit  an  itemized  claim  to Contractor reflecting any cost increases as a result of such change or addition. Failure to provide such a claim within the specified time frame shall waive any and all of Subcontractor's rights to additional costs or time increases associated with the change. If requested by the Contractor, Subcontractor shall within three (3) working days submit a reasonable, itemized price quotation for any proposed changes. If the Subcontractor does not and the Contractor is required to submit a price quotation to the Owner which  includes  the  subcontract  change,  Contractor  shall  use  its  best  estimate  of  the  proposed  change,  as  it  affects  the Subcontractor in its quotation to the Owner, which estimate shall be the maximum equitable adjustment due to the Subcontractor. It is expressly understood and agreed, regardless of any changes in or additions to the scope of the work, that no changes shall be made in the Subcontract Amount or the time of completion, except by a subcontract Change Order issued by Contractor and then only when such order sets forth the amount of any addition or deduction and is signed by both parties thereto. If Subcontractor initiates a substitution, deviation or change in the work which affects the scope of the work or the sublet work or causes costs or expenses to  Contractor,  Subcontractor  shall  be  liable  for  all  costs  and  expenses  thereof.  Any  change  order  which  reduces  the scope of the Subcontractors work need not to be signed by the Subcontractor if submitted by the Contractor prior to the actual performance of the work by the Subcontractor.
